points: Report on sources and hiring performance

ai.title: Screen less. Make better decisions.
ai.desc: AI analyzes job requirements and candidate profiles to prioritize CVs worth reviewing, explain matching signals and recommend potential talent.

functions.subtitle: Designed around real workflows, from sourcing to reporting.

posting.title: Smart job posting
posting.desc: Create clear posts with standardized occupations, skills and locations.

pipeline.desc: Track applicants across hiring stages and processing statuses.

database.title: Central CV database

analytics.title: Performance analytics

branding.title: Employer branding

services.title: Flexible solutions for every growth goal

ai.desc: Prioritize profiles with strong signals so recruiters can focus on important decisions.

branding.title: Employer branding

footer.tagline: AI-powered recruitment platform — post jobs, screen CVs and manage candidates in one place.

contactBand.title: We are ready to support your business
contactBand.subtitle: Our consultants support you from your first job posting to long-term hiring strategy.

about.heroTitle: Matching the right people to the right jobs with AI
about.heroSubtitle: We build a smart recruitment platform that helps Vietnamese businesses find the right talent faster, more accurately and at lower cost.
about.whoBody1: An AI-powered recruitment platform serving both candidates and businesses: candidates build professional CVs and get matching job suggestions; businesses post jobs, screen applications and manage the whole hiring pipeline in one place.
about.whoBody2: With automatic CV analysis and matching, we close the gap between employers and suitable candidates — so every posting reaches exactly who needs to see it.

ai.title: AI that actually works
ai.desc: AI screens, scores and recommends candidates based on real data, not just keywords.

efficiency.title: Measurable results
efficiency.desc: Every posting comes with clear numbers: views, applications received, match rates.

companion.title: A long-term partner
companion.desc: Hiring strategy consulting by industry and company size, not just selling packages.

contact.heroSubtitle: Send a consultation request or reach us directly via hotline or email — we reply during business hours.
